sql.query: SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.tenantName, COUNT(utr.roleId) AS roleCount, GROUP_CONCAT(r.roleName ORDER BY r.roleName SEPARATOR ', ') AS roleNames FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_tenants t ON t.id = utr.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id = utr.roleId WHERE utr.userId = :userId AND utr.status = 'active' GROUP BY t.id, t.tenantName ORDER BY t.tenantName ASC
